ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the destination */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the destination */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Flight duration */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (domestic/international) */,
  "seats_available" INTEGER /* Number of seats available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic record */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the traffic record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the traffic record */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the traffic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_traffic_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_traffic_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the airline */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airline */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance between airports */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of flights per week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of dashboard creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the report belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of report creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of alert creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_airport" (
  "country_airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country airport */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_airport_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destination_airport" (
  "destination_airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination airport */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destination_airport_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destination_airport_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the flight */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Arrival date of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the aircraft */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline that owns the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)
